'''Arachnoids''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] arachnids with a legspan of approximately 2.5 meters. They were covered in dense black and gray fur, and possessed four [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and powerful hind legs. [[Ptak-Sok]], copilot of the ''[[Black Widow]]'', was an Arachnoid.

They built the [[EMRG-50 Rail Gun]]s.

{{Species-stub}}
